health_details.gemini_analysis_summary: The battery shows signs of accelerated degradation due to high thermal stress (54.1°C) and a high fast-charge ratio of 42.9%. While the cycle count is moderate, the frequent high-current discharge events suggest it is best suited for stationary energy storage with active thermal management.

listing.title: Grade C+ ReVolt Certified Module | 412 Cycles | High-Capacity Storage
listing.description: This 412-cycle EV module offers a cost-effective solution for stationary SME energy storage. Rigorously tested via ReVolt OS, it is optimized for solar peak-shaving when used with appropriate thermal regulation.

safety_risks.description: Peak temperature reached 54.1°C, exceeding the 45°C safety threshold for industrial second-life certification.
safety_risks.mitigation: Integrate active cooling systems and limit continuous discharge current to below 50A.

safety_risks.description: Current spikes up to 81.1A detected, exceeding the 60A stress threshold.
safety_risks.mitigation: Configure BMS current limits and use high-gauge cabling to minimize resistive heating.

warnings: Peak temperature reached 54.1°C, exceeding the 45°C safety threshold for industrial second-life certification.
